headline: The agent is performing reliably with consistent success, but there are issues with zero latency and token reporting in some traces.

working.summary: Consistent success status across all traces indicating reliable performance.

broken.summary: Zero latency and token count reported in some traces, indicating potential data logging issues.

changed.summary: Latency has improved in recent traces compared to older ones.
